mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PRO_ID , COALESCE(PRO_GB, '') AS PRO_GB , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = PRO_GB), '') AS PRO_GB_NM , COALESCE(PRO_TARGET, '') AS PRO_TARGET , IF(LOCATE('E', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '초등', '') AS PRO_TYPE1 , IF(LOCATE('J', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '중등', '') AS PRO_TYPE2 , IF(LOCATE('H', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '고등', '') AS PRO_TYPE3 , IF(LOCATE('U', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '대학', '') AS PRO_TYPE4 , IF(LOCATE('T', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '기타', '') AS PRO_TYPE5 , IF(LOCATE('Y1', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '영유아', '') AS PRO_TYPE6 , IF(LOCATE('O1', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '일반', '') AS PRO_TYPE7 , CASE WHEN PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS PRO_TYPE , PRO_NM , COALESCE(PRO_TARGET_NM , '') AS PRO_TARGET_NM , COALESCE(ETC_NM , '') AS ETC_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_TO_DD , PRO_SUM , COALESCE(RUN_STA, '') AS RUN_STA , CASE WHEN RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS RUN_STA_NM FROM ARTPROM WHERE (RUN_STA IS NULL OR RUN_STA != '99') AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN REC_FROM_DD AND REC_TO_DD
AND (PRO_TYPE IS NULL OR PRO_TYPE != '03')
ORDER BY REC_FROM_DD ) A0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PRO_ID , COALESCE(PRO_GB, '') AS PRO_GB , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = PRO_GB), '') AS PRO_GB_NM , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR007' AND CODE = PRO_DEPA), '') AS PRO_DEPA_NM , COALESCE(PRO_PART, '') AS PRO_PART , COALESCE(PRO_TARGET, '') AS PRO_TARGET , IF(LOCATE('E', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '초등', '') AS PRO_TYPE1 , IF(LOCATE('J', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '중등', '') AS PRO_TYPE2 , IF(LOCATE('H', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '고등', '') AS PRO_TYPE3 , IF(LOCATE('U', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '대학', '') AS PRO_TYPE4 , IF(LOCATE('T', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '기타', '') AS PRO_TYPE5 , IF(LOCATE('Y1', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '영유아', '') AS PRO_TYPE6 , IF(LOCATE('O1', PRO_TARGET) > 0, '일반', '') AS PRO_TYPE7 , CASE WHEN PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS PRO_TYPE , PRO_NM , COALESCE(PRO_TARGET_NM , '') AS PRO_TARGET_NM , COALESCE(ETC_NM , '') AS ETC_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_TO_DD , PRO_SUM , COALESCE(RUN_STA, '') AS RUN_STA , CASE WHEN #{esntlId} IS NOT NULL AND #{esntlId} != '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ARTMARK M1 WHERE M1.ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId} AND M1.PRO_ID = ARTPROM.PRO_ID ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FAVORITE_YN , CASE WHEN RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS RUN_STA_NM FROM ARTPROM WHERE (RUN_STA IS NULL OR RUN_STA != '99') AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN REC_FROM_DD AND REC_TO_DD
AND (FIND_IN_SET('E1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E4', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E5', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E6', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND (FIND_IN_SET('J1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('J2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('J3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND (FIND_IN_SET('H1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('H2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('H3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{proTarget}, REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0
AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(REQ_GB,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', #{reqGbPosition}), '|', -1) = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', #{proPartPosition}), '|', -1) = 'Y'
AND PRO_TYPE IN
#{pt}
AND RUN_STA IN
#{rs}
AND ( COALESCE(PRO_NM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_SUM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_DESC, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_DEPA, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_CHARGE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_TEL, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_TARGET, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_ENQUIRY, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_HOW, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_SPACE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_NUM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_COST, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_PAGE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') )
ORDER BY REC_FROM_DD ) A0 LIMIT #{lengthPage} OFFSET #{startIndex}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTPROM WHERE (RUN_STA IS NULL OR RUN_STA != '99') AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN REC_FROM_DD AND REC_TO_DD
AND (FIND_IN_SET('E1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E4', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E5', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('E6', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND (FIND_IN_SET('J1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('J2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('J3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND (FIND_IN_SET('H1', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('H2', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET('H3', REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0)
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{proTarget}, REPLACE(PRO_TARGET, '|', ',')) > 0
AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(REQ_GB,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', #{reqGbPosition}), '|', -1) = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', #{proPartPosition}), '|', -1) = 'Y'
AND PRO_TYPE IN
#{pt}
AND RUN_STA IN
#{rs}
AND ( COALESCE(PRO_NM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_SUM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_DESC, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_DEPA, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_CHARGE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_TEL, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_TARGET, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_ENQUIRY, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_HOW, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_SPACE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_NUM, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_COST, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR COALESCE(PRO_PAGE, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') )

SELECT A.PRO_ID AS proId , COALESCE(A.PRO_GB, '') AS proGb , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = A.PRO_GB), '') AS proGbNm , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR007' AND CODE = A.PRO_DEPA), '') AS proDepaNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_PART, '') AS proPart , COALESCE(B.REQ_ID, '') AS reqId , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET, '') AS proTarget , IF(LOCATE('E', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '초등', '') AS proType1 , IF(LOCATE('J', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '중등', '') AS proType2 , IF(LOCATE('H', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '고등', '') AS proType3 , IF(LOCATE('U', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '대학', '') AS proType4 , IF(LOCATE('T', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '기타', '') AS proType5 , IF(LOCATE('Y1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '영유아', '') AS proType6 , IF(LOCATE('O1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '일반', '') AS proType7 , CASE WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS proType , A.PRO_NM AS proNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET_NM, '') AS proTargetNm , COALESCE(A.ETC_NM, '') AS etcNm , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recFromDd , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recToDd , A.PRO_SUM AS proSum , COALESCE(A.RUN_STA, '') AS runSta , CASE WHEN A.RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS runStaNm , CASE WHEN #{reqEsntlId} IS NOT NULL AND #{reqEsntlId} != '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ARTMARK M1 WHERE M1.ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND M1.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS favoriteYn , COALESCE(B.STTUS_CODE, '') AS appSttusCode , CASE WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '01' THEN '임시저장' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '02' THEN '신청' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '03' THEN '승인' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '04' THEN '완료' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '11' THEN '반려' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '12' THEN '중단' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS appSttusCodeNm , COALESCE(B.PRO_SEQ, '0') AS proSeq /* userWeb bizInput 진입 시 reqEsntlId는 자녀(student) 선택용으로 사용됨 */ , COALESCE(B.C_ESNTL_ID, B.REQ_ESNTL_ID, '') AS reqEsntlId , COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(DECRYPT(UC.USER_NM), '')), ''), COALESCE(DECRYPT(UR.USER_NM), ''), '' ) AS reqUserNm , COALESCE(B.RESULT_GB, '') AS resultGb FROM ARTAPPM B INNER JOIN ARTPROM A ON B.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER UC ON B.C_ESNTL_ID = UC.ESNTL_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER UR ON B.REQ_ESNTL_ID = UR.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.STTUS_CODE = 'A' /* REQ_ESNTL_ID = 신청자ID(로그인 사용자 uniqId) */ AND B.REQ_ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND B.STTUS_CODE = #{sttusCode} ORDER BY B.CHG_DATE DESC

SELECT A.PRO_ID AS proId , COALESCE(A.PRO_GB, '') AS proGb , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = A.PRO_GB), '') AS proGbNm , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR007' AND CODE = A.PRO_DEPA), '') AS proDepaNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_PART, '') AS proPart , COALESCE(B.REQ_ID, '') AS reqId , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET, '') AS proTarget , IF(LOCATE('E', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '초등', '') AS proType1 , IF(LOCATE('J', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '중등', '') AS proType2 , IF(LOCATE('H', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '고등', '') AS proType3 , IF(LOCATE('U', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '대학', '') AS proType4 , IF(LOCATE('T', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '기타', '') AS proType5 , IF(LOCATE('Y1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '영유아', '') AS proType6 , IF(LOCATE('O1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '일반', '') AS proType7 , CASE WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS proType , A.PRO_NM AS proNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET_NM, '') AS proTargetNm , COALESCE(A.ETC_NM, '') AS etcNm , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recFromDd , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recToDd , A.PRO_SUM AS proSum , COALESCE(A.RUN_STA, '') AS runSta , CASE WHEN A.RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS runStaNm , CASE WHEN #{reqEsntlId} IS NOT NULL AND #{reqEsntlId} != '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ARTMARK M1 WHERE M1.ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND M1.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS favoriteYn , COALESCE(B.STTUS_CODE, '') AS appSttusCode , CASE WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '01' THEN '임시저장' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '02' THEN '신청' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '03' THEN '승인' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '04' THEN '완료' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '11' THEN '반려' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '12' THEN '중단' WHEN B.STTUS_CODE = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS appSttusCodeNm , COALESCE(B.PRO_SEQ, '0') AS proSeq , COALESCE(B.REQ_ESNTL_ID, '') AS reqEsntlId , COALESCE(COALESCE(DECRYPT(UR.USER_NM)), '') AS reqUserNm , COALESCE(B.RESULT_GB, '') AS resultGb FROM ARTAPMM B INNER JOIN ARTPROM A ON B.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID LEFT JOIN ARMUSER UR ON B.REQ_ESNTL_ID = UR.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND B.STTUS_CODE = 'A' /* REQ_ESNTL_ID = 신청자ID(로그인 사용자 uniqId) */ AND B.REQ_ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND B.STTUS_CODE = #{sttusCode} ORDER BY B.CHG_DATE DESC

SELECT A.PRO_ID AS proId , COALESCE(A.PRO_GB, '') AS proGb , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = A.PRO_GB), '') AS proGbNm , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR007' AND CODE = A.PRO_DEPA), '') AS proDepaNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_PART, '') AS proPart , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET, '') AS proTarget , IF(LOCATE('E', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '초등', '') AS proType1 , IF(LOCATE('J', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '중등', '') AS proType2 , IF(LOCATE('H', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '고등', '') AS proType3 , IF(LOCATE('U', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '대학', '') AS proType4 , IF(LOCATE('T', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '기타', '') AS proType5 , IF(LOCATE('Y1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '영유아', '') AS proType6 , IF(LOCATE('O1', A.PRO_TARGET) > 0, '일반', '') AS proType7 , CASE WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN A.PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS proType , A.PRO_NM AS proNm , COALESCE(A.PRO_TARGET_NM, '') AS proTargetNm , COALESCE(A.ETC_NM, '') AS etcNm , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recFromDd , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A.REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS recToDd , A.PRO_SUM AS proSum , COALESCE(A.RUN_STA, '') AS runSta , CASE WHEN A.RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN A.RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS runStaNm , 'Y' AS favoriteYn FROM ARTMARK M1 INNER JOIN ARTPROM A ON M1.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID WHERE M1.ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND A.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND (A.RUN_STA IS NULL OR A.RUN_STA != '99') ORDER BY M1.CHG_DATE DESC LIMIT #{lengthPage} OFFSET #{startIndex}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTMARK M1 INNER JOIN ARTPROM A ON M1.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID WHERE M1.ESNTL_ID = #{reqEsntlId} AND A.STTUS_CODE = 'A' AND (A.RUN_STA IS NULL OR A.RUN_STA != '99')

SELECT COALESCE(A1.PRO_ID, '') AS PRO_ID , COALESCE(A1.PRO_GB, '') AS PRO_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TYPE, '') AS PRO_TYPE , COALESCE(A1.REQ_GB, '') AS REQ_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_NM, '') AS PRO_NM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TARGET_NM, '') AS PRO_TARGET_NM , COALESCE(A1.ETC_NM, '') AS ETC_NM , COALESCE(A1.EDU_GB, 'N') AS EDU_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TARGET, '') AS PRO_TARGET , COALESCE(A1.BASIC_YN, 'N') AS BASIC_YN , COALESCE(A1.POOR_YN, 'N') AS POOR_YN , COALESCE(A1.SINGLE_YN, 'N') AS SINGLE_YN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_TO_DD , COALESCE(A1.REC_CNT, 0) AS REC_CNT , COALESCE(A1.PRO_SUM, '') AS PRO_SUM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_DESC, '') AS PRO_DESC , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR007' AND CODE = A1.PRO_DEPA), '') AS PRO_DEPA , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.PRO_CHARGE), '') AS PRO_CHARGE , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.PRO_TEL), '') AS PRO_TEL , COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART, '') AS PRO_PART , COALESCE(CONCAT_WS(', ' , IF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', 1), '|', -1) = 'Y', '교육/학습', NULL) , IF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', 2), '|', -1) = 'Y', '진로/진학', NULL) , IF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', 3), '|', -1) = 'Y', '문화/예술/체험', NULL) , IF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', 4), '|', -1) = 'Y', '복지/장학', NULL) , IF(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART,'N|N|N|N|N'), REPEAT('|N', 5)), '|', 5), '|', -1) = 'Y', '기타', NULL) ), '') AS PRO_PART_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.PRO_FROM_DD, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS PRO_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.PRO_TO_DD, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS PRO_TO_DD , COALESCE(A1.PRO_ENQUIRY, '') AS PRO_ENQUIRY , COALESCE(A1.PRO_HOW, '') AS PRO_HOW , COALESCE(A1.PRO_SPACE, '') AS PRO_SPACE , COALESCE(A1.PRO_NUM, '') AS PRO_NUM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_COST, '') AS PRO_COST , COALESCE(A1.PRO_PAGE, '') AS PRO_PAGE , COALESCE(A1.PRO_DESIGN, '') AS PRO_DESIGN , COALESCE(A1.PRO_FILE_ID, '') AS PRO_FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.FILE_ID, '') AS FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.RUN_STA, '') AS RUN_STA , CASE WHEN RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS RUN_STA_NM , COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE, '') AS STTUS_CODE FROM ARTPROM A1 WHERE A1.PRO_ID = #{proId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A'

SELECT RUN_STA , CASE WHEN RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS RUN_STA_NM , PRO_ID , PRO_NM , CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(REC_FROM_DD, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(REC_TO_DD, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS REQ_DATE FROM ARTPROM WHERE SUBSTRING(REQ_GB, 7, 1) = 'Y' AND RUN_STA IN ('02', '04') AND STTUS_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY REC_FROM_DD DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTMARK ( ESNTL_ID, PRO_ID, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{esntlId}, #{proId}, #{esntlId}, NOW(), NOW() )
